member.name: T:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController
member.summary: Provides endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting expenses, plus a spending-summary endpoint.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.#ctor(ExpenseTracker.Application.Interfaces.IExpenseService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController})
member.summary: Initialises the controller with required dependencies.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.GetAll(System.String,System.Nullable{ExpenseTracker.Domain.Enums.Category},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all expenses for a user, optionally filtered by category.
member.param: Required. The user whose expenses to retrieve.
member.response: Returns the list of expenses (may be empty).

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.GetSummary(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns spending totals grouped by category plus a grand total for a user.
member.param: Required. The user whose summary to compute.
member.returns: Category totals and a grand total.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a single expense by its unique identifier.
member.param: The GUID identifier of the expense.
member.response: No expense found with the given id.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.Create(ExpenseTracker.Application.DTOs.CreateExpenseRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.returns: The newly created expense, with its assigned id.
member.response: One or more validation errors occurred.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.Update(System.Guid,ExpenseTracker.Application.DTOs.UpdateExpenseRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Replaces an existing expense with new values.
member.param: The GUID identifier of the expense to update.
member.response: No expense found with the given id.
One or more validation errors occurred.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Controllers.ExpensesController.Delete(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: The GUID identifier of the expense to delete.
member.response: No expense found with the given id.

member.name: T:ExpenseTracker.API.Extensions.ApplicationServiceExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Application-layer services.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Extensions.ApplicationServiceExtensions.AddApplicationServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers AutoMapper, FluentValidation validators, and application services.

member.name: T:ExpenseTracker.API.Extensions.SwaggerExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring Swagger / OpenAPI documentation.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Extensions.SwaggerExtensions.AddSwaggerDocumentation(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds Swagger generation with XML comments and API metadata.

member.name: T:ExpenseTracker.API.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Global exception handler that converts unhandled exceptions to RFC 7807 Problem Details responses, preventing stack-trace leakage to clients.

member.name: M:ExpenseTracker.API.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Executes the middleware pipeline and handles exceptions.
